settings.title: One size does not fit all
settings.subtitle: When it comes to healthcare
settings.main_content: We're proud to introduce our new personalized health technology that complements our line of dietary supplements. Our technology is built around three main products that work together to help you achieve your health goals.

settings.subtitle: Our Glucometer
settings.main_content: Our compact glucometer is an essential tool for monitoring your glucose levels. It's small and portable, fitting easily into your pocket, and connects to your phone through sound technology for seamless data transfer. Its affordability and convenience encourages frequent testing, so you can stay on top of your glucose levels anytime, anywhere.
